---
title: "wordcloud"
author: "Jack Schloesser"
date: "2026-04-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
install.packages(c("wordcloud", "RColorBrewer", "dplyr"))
install.packages("tm")
```

```{r}
library(wordcloud)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dplyr)
library(tm)
```

```{r}
word_counts <- word_df %>%
  count(word, sort = TRUE)

word_counts_filtered <- word_counts %>% #filters out words with less than 5 occurences
  filter(n >= 5)

word_counts_filtered <- word_counts %>% #filters out common words (the, a, etc.)
  filter(n >= 5) %>%
  filter(!word %in% stopwords("en"))

set.seed(123)

wordcloud(
  words = word_counts_filtered$word,
  freq = word_counts_filtered$n,
  min.freq = 5,
  max.words = 250,
  random.order = FALSE,
  rot.per = 0.35,
  colors = brewer.pal(8, "Dark2")
)
```
